retrieved_result: Admission to the Bar (Standard 504) "ABA Required Disclosures The American Bar Association (ABA) Standards and Rules of Procedure for Approval of Law Schools requires all law schools to publicly disclose certain categories of information on their websites. Standard 509 (a) requires that all consumer information reported by law schools
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses legal education accreditation and ABA disclosures, not IDEs or software development.
